title: Plumbing and Domestic Heating Technician (ST0303)
description: English apprenticeship standard covering installation, commissioning and maintenance of plumbing and domestic heating systems; the standard entry route into the trade.

title: Level 2 NVQ Diploma in Plumbing and Domestic Heating (6189-11)
description: Competence-based qualification assessed in the workplace; the baseline for practising plumbers (City & Guilds 6189; EAL equivalent available).

title: Level 3 NVQ Diploma in Plumbing and Domestic Heating (6189-21)
description: Advanced competence qualification including complex systems design, fault diagnosis and supervision; required for JIB-PMES Advanced grading.

title: Level 2 Diploma in Plumbing Studies (6035)
description: Knowledge-based college qualification covering plumbing science, common processes and system principles; usually paired with site experience.

title: Level 3 Diploma in Plumbing Studies (6035)
description: Advanced college qualification adding complex systems, environmental technologies and design; a common route towards NVQ Level 3.

title: Level 3 Award in Domestic Heat Networks and Heat Interface Units
description: LCL Awards qualification for installing, commissioning and maintaining HIUs on heat networks; directly relevant to heat-network acceptance work.

title: Unvented Hot Water Systems (Building Regulations G3)
description: BPEC/City & Guilds competency for installing, commissioning and servicing unvented hot water storage systems; legally required for unvented cylinder work.

title: Water Supply (Water Fittings) Regulations 1999
description: Water Regulations (WRAS) competency covering byelaws, backflow prevention and fittings compliance; expected for approved-contractor schemes such as WIAPS/WaterSafe.

title: CCN1 Core Domestic Gas Safety
description: ACS core gas safety assessment; the prerequisite for domestic gas appliance categories and Gas Safe registration.

title: CENWAT Central Heating Boilers and Water Heaters
description: ACS appliance category for domestic wet central-heating boilers and water heaters; held alongside CCN1 by heating engineers.

title: TMV2/TMV3 Thermostatic Mixing Valve Servicing
description: Training in commissioning and annual verification of thermostatic mixing valves under TMV2 (domestic) and TMV3 (healthcare) schemes; relevant to TMV certificates.

title: Legionella Awareness (ACoP L8)
description: Training in the control of legionella bacteria in hot and cold water systems under HSE ACoP L8 / HSG274; expected for engineers working on stored and blended water.

title: JIB-PMES Registered Plumber Card (CSCS)
description: Industry competence card evidencing qualifications and identity for site access; graded (Trained/Registered/Advanced) against NVQ level held.

title: Level 3 Award in Installation and Maintenance of Heat Pumps
description: LCL/BPEC qualification for air/ground source heat pump installation and servicing; increasingly relevant as networks integrate heat pumps.
